creator: info@chrishoyer.de
text:
Version: 16.0.1_1

After creating a new empty project (without a readme.md), the admin project page returns ERROR 500. When creating a new empty project (with a default readme.md), the project site also returns ERROR 500.

Checking the production.log shows the following possible error/trace:


ActionView::Template::Error (can't modify frozen String: "Bytes"):
    19:               .description
    20:                 = markdown_field(project, :description)
    21:           .stats.gl-text-gray-500.gl-flex-shrink-0.gl-display-none.gl-sm-display-flex
    22:             = gl_badge_tag storage_counter(project.statistics&.storage_size)
    23:             = render_if_exists 'admin/projects/archived', project: project
    24: 
    25:           .controls.gl-flex-shrink-0.gl-ml-5
  
app/helpers/storage_helper.rb:9:in `storage_counter'
